---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for RGFX
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Component

Which part of RGFX would this affect?

- [ ] Hub (Electron app)
- [ ] Driver (ESP32 firmware)
- [ ] Interceptor (MAME Lua scripts)
- [ ] New game support
- [ ] New LED effect
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or other information.
